title: Message queue deduplication → Slack retry is no-op
evidence: All 4 TC-025 tests passed in 1306ms (121/121 total suite): - ✓ First enqueueMessage creates exactly one PENDING row - ✓ Duplicate enqueueMessage (same event_id=Ev_DUP_001) returns false — no new row - ✓ deliverPendingMessages delivers exactly once to tenant runtime (1 HTTP call to :3100/message) - ✓ Second deliverPendingMessages after delivery makes 0 additional runtime calls; row count stays 1
